home.hero.title: Sayelesend Message
home.hero.subtitle: The Complete Business Messaging Platform
home.hero.description: Send SMS, WhatsApp, Telegram, and Facebook Messenger at scale. AI-powered assistants, smart automation, real-time analytics, and enterprise-grade security — all in one platform.
home.hero.trustedBy: Trusted by businesses across Africa and beyond
home.section.channels.subtitle: Reach your audience wherever they are with one unified API
home.channel.sms.desc: Send single or bulk SMS with delivery tracking, DLR webhooks, and multi-provider failover.
home.channel.whatsapp.desc: Send rich media, templates, and interactive messages via WhatsApp Business Cloud API.
home.channel.telegram.desc: Reach Telegram users with text, media, and bot-powered conversational flows.
home.channel.messenger.desc: Engage customers on Messenger with automated responses and rich content.
home.section.features.subtitle: Powerful tools built for African businesses and global enterprises
home.feature.bulkSms.desc: Send thousands of messages with scheduling, CSV import, campaign tracking, and PDF/Excel reports.
home.feature.inbox.desc: View all conversations across SMS, WhatsApp, Telegram, and Messenger in one threaded inbox.
home.feature.contacts.desc: Organize contacts into groups, import from CSV, and manage suppression lists for compliance.
home.feature.templates.desc: Create reusable templates with variables for quick personalized messaging across all channels.
home.feature.automation.desc: Set up auto-replies, keyword triggers, and rule-based workflows to handle messages 24/7.
home.feature.analytics.desc: Track delivery rates, message volume, costs, and channel performance with interactive dashboards.
home.feature.webhooks.desc: Receive real-time delivery reports, status callbacks, and incoming message notifications via webhooks.
home.feature.api.desc: Full REST API with documentation, API key management, rate limiting, and code examples in multiple languages.
home.feature.multiProvider.desc: Connect Twilio, Vonage, MTarget, and more. Automatic failover ensures maximum delivery.
home.section.ai.subtitle: Let AI supercharge your messaging with smart assistants and email tools
home.ai.chatbot.desc: Deploy custom AI chatbots trained on your knowledge base. Handle customer queries 24/7 with voice input/output, human handover, and department routing.
home.ai.email.desc: Summarize emails, draft replies, compose new messages, review documents, and translate — all powered by AI. Integrates with Microsoft Outlook.
home.ai.bulk.desc: Generate personalized bulk messages with AI. Create thousands of unique, contextual messages from a single prompt.
home.ai.training.desc: Train AI assistants with your brand tone, sample Q&A, vocabulary, and guidelines for consistent, on-brand responses.
home.section.security.subtitle: Built for businesses that take security seriously
home.security.encryption.desc: All sensitive data is encrypted at rest with AES-256-GCM encryption.
home.security.optout.desc: Automated opt-out processing, suppression lists, and full compliance activity logs.
home.security.rbac.desc: Admin, Client, and Viewer roles with granular permissions for every feature.
home.security.audit.desc: Complete audit trail of all actions, API calls, and configuration changes.
home.section.admin.subtitle: Manage clients, credits, and operations from a centralized dashboard
home.admin.clients.desc: Onboard clients, assign roles, manage providers, enable add-on features, and monitor usage per client.
home.admin.credits.desc: Manage credit packages, track consumption, set low-balance alerts, and view detailed billing analytics.
home.admin.reports.desc: Export campaign performance as PDF or Excel reports with delivery stats, cost breakdowns, and timelines.
home.section.integration.subtitle: Simple REST API with full documentation and code samples
home.footer.tagline: The complete business messaging platform for Africa and beyond.
